steps.title: Factor out the common term (t+3)
steps.content:
Notice that $(t+3)$ appears in both terms on the left side. Factor it out:

$$5(t+3)-7(t+3)=(5-7)(t+3)=-2(t+3)$$

The equation becomes:
$$-2(t+3)=38$$

steps.title: Solve for t
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $-2$:
$$t+3=\frac{38}{-2}=-19$$

Subtract 3 from both sides:
$$t=-19-3=-22$$
